scripts.build: tsc && npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && npm run sanitize:homey-build
scripts.start: zsh -lc 'log_dir=${PELS_LOG_DIR:-/tmp/pels}; mkdir -p "$log_dir"; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true); branch=${branch:-${PWD:t}}; branch=$(printf "%s" "$branch" | tr -cs "A-Za-z0-9._-" "-"); homey_id=$(node scripts/resolve-homey-id.mjs 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); commit=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || commit="${commit}-dirty"; out="$log_dir/start.${branch}.${homey_id}.stdout.log"; err="$log_dir/start.${branch}.${homey_id}.stderr.log"; printf "===== PELS START %s commit=%s branch=%s =====\n" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$commit" "$branch" | tee -a "$out" "$err" >/dev/null; { npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && homey app run --remote; } > >(tee -a "$out") 2> >(tee -a "$err" >&2)'
scripts.install-app: zsh -lc 'log_dir=${PELS_LOG_DIR:-/tmp/pels}; mkdir -p "$log_dir"; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true); branch=${branch:-${PWD:t}}; branch=$(printf "%s" "$branch" | tr -cs "A-Za-z0-9._-" "-"); homey_id=$(node scripts/resolve-homey-id.mjs 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); commit=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || commit="${commit}-dirty"; out="$log_dir/install-app.${branch}.${homey_id}.stdout.log"; err="$log_dir/install-app.${branch}.${homey_id}.stderr.log"; printf "===== PELS START %s commit=%s branch=%s =====\n" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$commit" "$branch" | tee -a "$out" "$err" >/dev/null; { npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && homey app install; } > >(tee -a "$out") 2> >(tee -a "$err" >&2)'
scripts.arch:check: dependency-cruiser --config .dependency-cruiser.cjs app.ts flowCards drivers lib setup "widgets/*/src" packages/settings-ui/src packages/contracts/src packages/shared-domain/src
scripts.test:unit: vitest run --config vitest.config.fast.mts && vitest run --config vitest.config.dom.fast.mts
scripts.ci:test:playwright:quick: npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run build && CI=1 PELS_E2E_BUILD=0 npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run test:e2e -- --project=chromium-mobile-width
scripts.ci:test:playwright: npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run build && CI=1 PELS_E2E_BUILD=0 npm --workspace @pels/settings-ui run test:e2e -- --project=chromium-mobile-width --project=firefox-mobile-width
scripts.ci: npm run ci:checks && npm run ci:test:runtime && npm run ci:test:settings-ui
scripts.ci:full: npm run build && npm run ci && npm run ci:test:playwright
scripts.validate: homey app validate && npm run package:check
scripts.start:local: zsh -lc 'log_dir=${PELS_LOG_DIR:-/tmp/pels}; mkdir -p "$log_dir"; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || true); branch=${branch:-${PWD:t}}; branch=$(printf "%s" "$branch" | tr -cs "A-Za-z0-9._-" "-"); homey_id=$(node scripts/resolve-homey-id.mjs 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); commit=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); git diff --quiet 2>/dev/null || commit="${commit}-dirty"; out="$log_dir/start-local.${branch}.${homey_id}.stdout.log"; err="$log_dir/start-local.${branch}.${homey_id}.stderr.log"; printf "===== PELS START %s commit=%s branch=%s =====\n" "$(date -u +%FT%TZ)" "$commit" "$branch" | tee -a "$out" "$err" >/dev/null; { npm run build:settings && npm run build:widgets && homey app run; } > >(tee -a "$out") 2> >(tee -a "$err" >&2)'
